status_detail: Stock Analyzer universe audit has not yet covered the full stock+ETF universe

meta_summary.data_truth_state: Critical truth degradation: Historical probabilities are stale.

root_causes.title: Historical probabilities are stale
root_causes.why: Regime daily last market date is 2026-03-26. Historical profile coverage is 40819/71012 stock files; latest run asset classes=STOCK.
root_causes.impact: Regime and passive probability context lags the market and should not be treated as current.
root_causes.fix: Run the full historical-profile builder over the registry-backed stock+ETF universe, then verify run-summary coverage and regime date advance together.

root_causes.title: Stock Analyzer universe audit has not yet covered the full stock+ETF universe
root_causes.why: Latest audit processed 5/5 assets and found 3 failure families affecting 5 assets.
root_causes.impact: This is the only universe-wide proof that analyze-v4 renders all required UI contracts correctly across stocks and ETFs.
root_causes.fix: Run the full stock-analyzer universe audit over STOCK+ETF and then regenerate the dashboard status artifacts.

root_causes.title: Snapshot is current but depends on degraded upstream inputs
root_causes.impact: Snapshot rows currently render, but part of the dependency chain still lags.
root_causes.fix: Keep snapshot generation tied to explicit upstream freshness checks so QuantLab staleness cannot hide behind a fresh render timestamp.

automation_health.summary: Latest refresh hit forecast_backfill_outcomes, but current published artifacts already recovered and automation remains operational.

dependency_health.reason: Provider-backed v7 history refresh is the first upstream market-data hop.
Q1 delta ingest can only advance after v7 history refresh touches newer packs.
QuantLab daily report reads raw-bar freshness from the Q1 ingest layer.
Hist-probs/regime computation requires the same raw market bars to advance.
Scientific summary is sourced from stock-analysis snapshots rather than QuantLab raw bars.
Forecast batch is independent from QuantLab raw-bar freshness.
Learning report aggregates forecast/scientific/elliott source artifacts.
Breakout/snapshot combines forecast freshness with QuantLab publish layers.
The universe-wide analyze-v4 audit is only trustworthy after all upstream data and snapshot layers are current.
ETF diagnostic explains the current snapshot funnel output.
V1 audit requires current learning artifacts and snapshot outputs.
Cutover readiness is evaluated after the V1 audit is available.

market_data_refresh.label: Market Data Refresh
market_data_refresh.why: Latest v7 history refresh report was generated at 2026-04-03T19:39:10Z with observed market data only up to 2026-04-02.
market_data_refresh.next_fix: Run the provider-backed history refresh first; if it does not advance, inspect provider auth/quota and refresh report outputs before touching downstream jobs.

status_detail.impact: No newer market history can flow into delta ingest, QuantLab raw bars, hist-probs, or the snapshot dependency chain.

failure_signals: output_asof missing or older than the latest trading day
assets_fetched_with_data = 0 with output_asof null (pre-market run or quota exhaustion — re-run after market close)

q1_delta_ingest.label: Q1 Delta Ingest
q1_delta_ingest.why: Latest successful Q1 delta ingest is anchored to ingest_date=2026-04-04 and was updated at 2026-04-04T20:53:47Z.
q1_delta_ingest.next_fix: After the upstream history refresh advances, rerun the Q1 delta ingest and verify latest_success.json moves forward before rebuilding QuantLab reports.

status_detail.impact: QuantLab raw-bar freshness cannot advance until the delta ingest layer has incorporated newer market history.

quantlab_daily_report.label: QuantLab Daily Report
quantlab_daily_report.why: QuantLab-Marktdaten sind aktuell bis 2026-04-03; der Modell-Cutoff 2026-03-11 ist im erwarteten 20T-Labelfenster.
quantlab_daily_report.next_fix: Advance canonical raw part files first, then rebuild snapshot/feature-store/report so a fresh render timestamp cannot mask stale QuantLab data.

operational_freshness.label: aktuell

web_validation_chain.label: v7 history -> delta ingest -> QuantLab publish

web_validation_chain.success_signal: q1_delta_ingest and quantlab_daily_report both ok with current as-of dates

web_validation_chain.label: Status artifact -> dashboard_v7
web_validation_chain.success_signal: dashboard_v7 reflects the current status artifacts without stale cache or missing fields

ssot_violations.title: hist_probs ran without ETF asset class
ssot_violations.why: Last hist_probs run used asset_classes=[STOCK]. SSOT run_command requires STOCK,ETF. ETF tickers have no historical profiles in analyze-v4.
ssot_violations.success_signal: run-summary.json asset_classes includes both STOCK and ETF

ssot_violations.title: QuantLab canonical data lags bridge/any ingest by 23 days
ssot_violations.why: latestCanonicalRequiredDataDate=2026-03-11 but latestAnyRequiredDataDate=2026-04-03 — gap of 23 calendar days. QuantLab models compute features on stale canonical partitions, not the bridge-only data.
ssot_violations.success_signal: latestCanonicalRequiredDataDate within 5 calendar days of latestAnyRequiredDataDate

ssot_violations.title: Snapshot quantlab_asof lags data_asof by 19 days
ssot_violations.why: snapshot.meta.quantlab_asof=2026-03-11 but snapshot.meta.data_asof=2026-03-30. Candidates on the frontpage are ranked using QuantLab evidence that is 19 days old relative to market data.
ssot_violations.success_signal: snapshot.meta.quantlab_asof within 7 calendar days of snapshot.meta.data_asof

  ✓ Freshness: weekend handling - last trading day from Sunday

  ✓ Trigger: high >= trigger and close < trigger → rejected
  ✓ Trigger: close >= trigger → confirmed breakout
  ✓ Trigger: close exactly at trigger → confirmed

  ✓ Gate: raw validation VALID allows BUY
  ✓ Gate: raw validation INVALID suppresses all

  ✓ Gate: RSI >= 80 does NOT affect WAIT
  ✓ Gate: metric drift blocks BUY
  ✓ Gate: metric drift does NOT affect AVOID

  ✓ deriveRawGate: undefined input defaults to VALID

  ✓ deriveRawGate: valid=false → INVALID + suppressed
